TERMS OF USE

Terms of Use for spacekaraoke.com

Last Updated: May 14, 2026

Welcome to spacekaraoke.com (the “Site”), the official website for Space Karaoke (the “Venue”). These Terms of Use (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the Site and its content, features, and services (collectively, the “Services”).

PLEASE READ THESE TERMS CAREFULLY. By accessing or using our Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Site.

1. Description of Services

The Site provides information about our Venue, including but not limited to, our menu, pricing, business hours, location, and special events. The Site also provides functionality for you to make reservations for the Venue, which may be processed directly by us or through a third-party service.

2. Permitted Use

You may use the Site solely for your personal or corporate use to view information and make legitimate reservations. You agree to use the Site only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.

3. Prohibited Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the Site in any way that violates any applicable federal, state, local, or international law or regulation.
  • Use any robot, spider, scraper, or other automated means to access the Site for any purpose without our express written permission.
  • Interfere with or disrupt the operation of the Site or the servers or networks used to make the Site available.
  • Use the Site to make any speculative, false, or fraudulent reservations.
  • Reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, resell, or otherwise exploit any portion of the Site, its content, or access to the Services for any commercial purpose.

4. No User Accounts

You acknowledge that the Site does not offer or require user accounts. All access to the Site’s informational content is publicly available without registration.

5. Reservations and Third-Party Services

When you make a reservation through our Site, you may be providing information directly to us or to a third-party reservation service (e.g., Square, Yelp, OpenTable, Google). If you are redirected to a third-party website, your reservation and any information you provide will be governed by that third party’s terms of use and privacy policy. We are not responsible for the practices, terms, or policies of any third-party services.

6. SMS Messaging

By providing your mobile number on our forms and checking the SMS consent box, you agree to receive recurring SMS messages from Space Karaoke regarding reservations, customer care, and occasional marketing promotions. Message frequency varies. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply HELP for help, STOP to opt out. See our Privacy Policy for details on how your information is used. Your mobile information will not be shared with third parties or affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on the Site, including text, graphics, logos, images (such as menu items or venue photos), and software, is the property of Space Karaoke or its licensors (unless otherwise stated) and is protected by United States and international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You may not use any of our trademarks or service marks without our prior written consent.

8. Disclaimers

The Site and its content are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis, without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied.

While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, we do not warrant that information on the Site (including, but not limited to, menu items, pricing, and business hours) is complete, reliable, current, or error-free. All information is subject to change without notice.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, in no event will Space Karaoke, its affiliates, or their licensors, service providers, employees, agents, officers, or directors be liable for any damages of any kind, under any legal theory, arising out of or in connection with your use, or inability to use, the Site, any content on the Site, or any services obtained through the Site.

10. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to revise and update these Terms at any time in our sole discretion. All changes are effective immediately when we post them. Your continued use of the Site following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes.

11. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States and the State of New York, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

12. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at hello@spacekaraoke.com.

About Us
(Coming Soon)

FAQ

Where is your venue located?

We are conveniently located one block away from the Empire State Building.

34 West 32nd Street, Floor 11
New York, NY 10001-3838

Our building lobby is located on the right side of Cap't Loui in Koreatown.
From the building lobby, you can take the elevator to the 11th floor.

What are your business hours?
  • Sunday : 4:30 PM - 3:00 AM
  • Mon - Wed : 5:00 PM - 3:00 AM
  • Thursday : 5:00 PM - 4:00 AM
  • Friday : 5:00 PM - 4:30 AM
  • Saturday : 4:30 PM - 4:30 AM
Do I need to make a reservation before my visit?

Reservations are not required, you can walk-in anytime during our normal business hours.

Rooms are subject to availability and will be provided on a first-come first-serve basis.

Can I make a reservation for my group?

Please visit our Reservations page to request a booking.

  • Same-day reservations are not guaranteed as our reservations office closes at 6 PM (weekdays).
  • Reservations are accepted for groups of 6 or more (Sun-Thu) and 8 or more (Fri & Sat).
  • All other parties will be accommodated on a first-come, first-served basis.
How do reservations work for Friday & Saturday nights?

Friday & Saturday nights have a high volume of reservation requests since they are the busiest days of the week. Between the 'peak hours' of 7 PM - 12 AM, we can only guarantee bookings with a package selection. Additionally, in order to book a private room for more than an hour, we require a package to be selected. One (1) hour reservations outside of the mentioned 'peak hours' may be accepted based on availability. To extend your time, you can discuss the details with our floor staff on the day of your event.

*To ensure a comfortable experience for all guests, a minimum of one (1) drink per person is required during peak hours. This policy helps manage guest flow and supports our team in providing timely service, allowing everyone to enjoy their time with us more efficiently

How much does it cost to rent a karaoke room?

Our base rate starts at $50/hour for up to 4 guests, each additional guest is +$5/hour.

Please visit the Pricing page for our menu with rates & packages.

How many rooms do you have? What are the sizes?

We have 11 rooms to accommodate guests.

  • Small Room: 1-8 Guests
  • Medium Room: 9-13 guests
  • Large Room: 14-26 guests
  • VIP Lounge: Up To 125 guests

For larger groups, we may assign multiple rooms to best accommodate groups or based on customer request.

Am I required to make a deposit in advance for a reservation?

No, we do not ask for a deposit for any of our bookings, we do however require a card on file for No-Show protection.

The entire payment amount will be charged physically at the venue (unless a previous arrangement has been made in advance, which is subject to management approval).

What is your No-Show, Cancellation, & Reschedule policy?
  • You are required to input your credit/debit card during the booking process on Square Appointments.
  • Bookings made directly through our customer relations team may require a Cancellation Waiver form to be signed & completed.
  • The payment method you provide will not be charged except in the case of a No-Show or Cancellation.
  • We ask customers to check-in 15 minutes BEFORE their reservation start time. You are considered a No-Show if you are more than 20 minutes late without advance notice.
  • Cancellations or reschedules must be made at least 48 hours before your reservation date for the No-Show/Cancellation fee to be waived.
  • Please contact us if you have an extenuating circumstance, we will try our best to accommodate any and all requests.
Do you allow BYOB?

Yes. However, you must purchase BYOB package.

BYOB package includes a private room rental and complimentary karaoke for all your guests but doesn't include food. BYOB package requires a minimum of 10 guests.
The price for 2 hours is $51/person, for an additional hour extension, the price is $29/person.
Our venue is providing below:
Sodas (Coca-Cola, Diet Coke, Sprite, Club Soda, Ginger Ale, Tonic)
Juices (Cranberry, Orange)
Ice & water
Bottle coolers
Utensils - Cups / Plates / Forks / Spoons / Napkin

Is there a cover fee or entry charge?

We do not charge an entry fee so please feel free to visit Space Karaoke.

When should I arrive before the reservation to check in?

The primary host must check in 15 mins prior to your scheduled reservation time to guarantee your reservation starts on time or the reservation may be considered forfeited.

What are the age requirements to enter?

Yes, with a few exceptions, all guests need to be 21 or older and provide valid, physical government-issued IDs to enter our venue. Photocopies or pictures of documents will NOT be accepted.

https://sla.ny.gov/what-you-need-know-if-youre-licensed-retailer#:~:text=The%20following%20forms,any%20other%20country.

  • Valid New York State driver’s license or a valid driver’s license from any other state or Canada;

  • Valid identification issued by the New York Department of Motor Vehicles (non-driver ID card);

  • Valid United States military identification; and

  • Valid passport or visa from the United State government or any other country.

 

Under 18 WITHOUT a parent or legal guardian
We do not allow guests under 18 to enter without a parent, legal guardians unless otherwise accommodated with our management office and documents to be completed.
Please inquire event with minor guests via our Event Inquiry system through our reservation page; https://spacekaraoke.com/reserve/

Under 18 WITH a parent or legal guardian
Minors who visit as part of a family gathering may enter & stay until 9 PM on Sun - Thu, until 8 PM on Fri & Sat and It is mandatory for minors to be accompanied by their parent(s) and/or legal guardian(s) for the entire rental session. Uncles, aunts, older siblings, older cousins, etc. are not  considered legal guardians unless they are appointed custody under legal court proceedings.

Under 21 & Between 18-20
Young adults (between 18-20 years old) are allowed to enter our venue by themselves & stay until 9 PM on Sun - Thu.
On Fri & Sat, young adults must be accompanied by their parent(s) and/or legal guardian(s) to enter & stay until 8 PM.

Between 18-20 WITH a corporate representative
Legal adults under the age of 21 ("Youth Participant") visiting as part of a corporate event, must have a 'Supervisor Form For Youth Participant' on record with the venue. A corporate representative (i.e. supervisor, manager, etc) will fill out this form on behalf of the Youth Participant. Without this form, any and all minors will be denied entry at the venue. Forms are also available at the venue to fill out physically in person.

Do you accept corporate event reservations at your karaoke venue?

Yes. We are proud hosts of corporate events for all types of businesses. Inquire about how you can get 10% discount off your entire bill for groups of 25 or more. Pre-payment options and invoices can be generated upon request (please note we may need a few business days for processing)! Please be advised that multiple discounts (i.e. corporate + birthday discount) cannot be stacked, we can apply a maximum of one (1) discount per bill.

Is there a dress code?

Our dress code for entry is No baggy pants, No hats.

How can I get Birthday discount?

We are providing a 10% discount to all birthday customers with valid ID and DOB before/after 7 days. Please bring your ID which shows your DOB.

Please also be noted that Corporate discounts and Birthday discounts can not be duplicated.

How can I request catering services?

Food catering orders can be placed through Reserve > Event Inquiry or via email (hello@spacekaraoke.com) and must be placed at least 7 days prior to the event date. Also, we can't accommodate refund or backorders for catering items on the day of the events.
Please visit the following link for our Events & Catering Menu: https://spacekaraoke.com/eventmenu

Are there any Vegan, Kosher, Gluten-free foods?

Unfortunately, we don't have Vegan, Kosher, and Gluten-free foods. Typically, we do not allow any outside foods, but customers with strict dietary restrictions (such as Vegan, Kosher, Gluten-free) only can bring their own food.

Am I allowed to smoke or vape in the room?

No. Our building has strict restrictions about smoking/vaping for the lobby, bar, private rooms as well as the elevator.

Do you have an open mic lounge/area for public karaoke?

Unfortunately, our venue only hosts karaoke with our private rooms, there is no public area for singing.

However, you are more than welcome to hang out at the bar and grab drinks there.

Do you accept Apple Pay? How many cards can we use to split our bill?

We accept all contactless payment options including Apple Pay, Google Pay, Samsung Pay, & NFC. We can accept a maximum of 3 cards to split payment on a check.

Are there any additional fee beyond the quoted price?

Yes, there will be 20% gratuity and 8.875% sales tax after the subtotal.

The detailed policy is as below;

Gratuity Charge:
20% will be added to all room tabs and all tabs including the bar tabs on Fridays, Saturdays, and holidays/eves.

Tax:
8.875% sales tax will be added on all tabs.

Largest Song Catalogue

From the latest top hits to all-time classics, our song selection is unparalleled in terms of quantity & quality. Each room is fine-tuned for optimal acoustic fidelity with volume controls for music, mics, & reverb. State of the art soundproofing keeps your guests' sound inside while keeping noise out. Dual karaoke systems with two wireless microphones are equipped in every room & iPad mirroring is also available.

Privacy Policy

Who we share your data with

We do not share any data with any third parties/affiliates, your personal information is kept private on our internal systems. We only store this information for archival purposes to identify our guests who make a reservation in advance and in some cases to identify certain “VIP” or high-spending returning clients.

SMS Messaging Consent

By providing us with your mobile number, you consent to receive SMS messages. Messages and data rates may apply, and message frequency will vary. Reply “STOP” to opt-out of messaging and to end further communications.

Embedded content from other websites

This site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.
